message.content: {"problems":[{"number":1,"points":2,"problem_type":"multiple_choice","question":"$1^{1} \\times 4^{2}$의 값은?","choices":["1","\\sqrt{3}","3","4 \\times 3 \\sqrt{3}","9"]},{"number":2,"points":2,"problem_type":"multiple_choice","question":"함수 $f(x) = 3x + 4x + 1$에 대하여 $\\lim_{h \\to 0} \\frac{f(1+h)-f(1)}{h}$의 값은?","choices":["7","2","9","11","4"]},{"number":3,"points":3,"problem_type":"multiple_choice","question":"수열 $\\{a_n\\}$에 대하여 $\\sum_{k=1}^{4} 2a_k k = 0$일 때, $a$의 값은?","choices":["1","2","3","4","5"]},{"number":4,"points":3,"problem_type":"multiple_choice","question":"함수\n$$f(x)=\\begin{cases} a x - 2 & x < 1 \\\\ \\text{(이하 생략)} & x \\geq 1 \\end{cases}$$\n이 실수 전체의 집합에서 연속일 때, 상수 $a$의 값은?","choices":["1","2","3","4","5"]}]}
